stemHtml: Within the PBN concept, how is “availability” defined?

options.a: The ability of a system to maintain position accuracy 99.99% of the time
options.b: The assurance that position accuracy is within 1x RNAV/RNP requirements 95% of the time
options.c: The ability of a system to provide timely warnings when it should not be used for navigation
options.d: The percentage of time (annually) during which the system is available for use
